title: hieracium subgracilipes
side_effects: Hieracium subgracilipes can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions, including skin irritation and respiratory issues. Ingesting large quantities can cause stomach upset, nausea, and even vomiting. Additionally, prolonged use of this plant may lead to liver damage and other organ complications. In severe cases, improper use of Hieracium subgracilipes can result in seizures, coma, or even death.
